setting: An impossible porch opens onto Blackwood Hill, where blue lanterns mark old paths and doors remember lies.
opening: Rain taps the roof of a porch that should not exist. Beyond the steps, Blackwood Hill glows with blue lanterns between the trees.
quest_hooks: Find the missing porch key before midnight.
Rescue the lantern-maker's apprentice from the Candle Court.
Descend into Blackwood Hill and learn why the dice keep landing on 13.

infinite_porch.title: The Infinite Porch
infinite_porch.summary: A porch between ordinary life and the lantern road.
facts: One key is missing from the porch key ring.

blackwood_hill.title: Blackwood Hill
blackwood_hill.summary: A forested hill where blue lanterns burn and doors remember lies.
facts: Every door remembers the last lie spoken near it.
